effect.subject: tok_ibsrela_dtp_green_panel_color
effect.reserved_for: affordability block OR symptom-icon trio (never both stacked), max once per email

rule_text: Within one email, the green panel (#01A47E) appears at most once and is reserved for either the affordability block or the symptom-icon trio — never both stacked.
intent: Preserve the green accent as a rare, single-purpose emphasis panel per email.
summary: Green panel (#01A47E) appears once per email, reserved for either affordability block or symptom-icon trio, never both stacked.
